content: I have acquired an extra copy of Egbert Rijke's "Introduction to Homotopy Type Theory" due to a requested order cancellation that didn't cancel. I am sure that my local library would not take such an advanced text for use by the public. Do you want it? Email ray at rayvadams dot com. US residents only please. I am willing to pay the postage to make sure this ends up in the hands of someone who will appreciate it, but not for international shipping.
